name: hud_ui_composite_panel_reapply_entry_count
description: HudUiCompositePanel::ReapplyEntryCount recomputes the current vector count and delegates ResizeEntryCount(0, currentCount), or ResizeEntryCount(0, 0) for an empty vector.
known_limits: Depends on HudUiCompositePanel::ResizeEntryCount, which is functionally accepted but still needs coherent class-level binary-safe verification.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ReapplyEntryCount@HudUiCompositePanel@@QAEXXZ at 0x4bbe90 still fails: 46 unmasked mismatches, 8 relocation bytes masked, 2 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 54 bytes and the VC object symbol is 32 bytes. The drift is local wrapper/source-shape scheduling around vector count and the ResizeEntryCount call.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows thiscall, a null-vector fast path pushing 0 and 0, otherwise currentEntryCount from the 0x2c0-byte vector span, then a call to HudUiCompositePanel::ResizeEntryCount with oldCount 0.
The native composite-panel resize smoke validates ReapplyEntryCount clears and hides all current entries and resets activeEntryCount to 0.
